calendar.matters:
ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Jul-06-2018 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Leigh Curran, Esq. 626-535-1900 Anglin Flewelling Rasmussen Campbell for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Inju Kim 415-681-2236 Defendant in Pro Per.
Defendant Paul Kim is not present
Korean Court Interpreter Ted Kim assissts Defendant.

RULING - ARGUED. The Court announces the tentative ruling off the record and shares his views on the record. Plaintiff argues commercial code. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank's motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication on its sole cause of action for money due on dishonor of check against defendants Paul Han Kim and In Ju Kim is denied. Wells Fargo has provided insufficient evidence to satisfy its burden of showing that it is a holder in due course. In particular, Wells Fargo fails to provide any evidence when it paid any money on the check, what it had done before doing so, whether it had any notice that the check might be dishonored, and why it chose not to place a hold on the check, if in fact it did not place a hold on the check.

Defendants to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Mar-22-2018 Assigned To Arbitration On Jun-25-18

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Continued To May-07-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Leigh Curran, Esq. 626-535-1900 of Anglin Flewelling Rasmussen Campbell & Trytten LLP for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Inju Kim 415-681-2236 and Paul Kim Defendants in Pro Per assisted by Andrew Kim, nephew.
Korean Interpreter Ted Kim is present and assists Inju Kim.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court states history of case, and how No Opposition has been filed by Defendant. Both Defendants oppose Wells Fargo entering a judgment against them. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Continued to 5/7/18 at 9:30 am. Defendant to file Opposition papers and serve them on Wells Fargo by 4/16/18. Wells Fargo to file reply papers by 4/30/18. Wells Fargo to send copies of the motion for Summary Judgment to Defendants. Defendants to email Opposition papers to Wells Fargo. Counsel for Wells Fargo to prepare an order continuing the assignment to arbitration for 3 months.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

Leigh Curran, Esq. 626-535-1900 of Anglin Flewelling Rasmussen Campbell & Trytten LLP for Plaintiff.
Inju Kim 415-681-2236 Defendant in Pro Per is assisted by his grandson Andrew Kim.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant requests a Korean Interpreter. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is continued to March 14, 2018 at 9:30 am. The Court to provide a Korean interpreter to assist Defendants.
